name: Contract
description: Legal contracts — parties, key dates, governing law, obligations.
instructions: Extract: contract title, party A (name + role), party B (name + role), effective date, expiry date, governing law, jurisdiction, key obligations (as an array of short descriptions), termination conditions, payment terms (if any), confidentiality clause present (boolean), non-compete clause present (boolean). Mark fields not present in the document as null.
